caption: An older man with white hair, wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-down shirt, stands behind a wooden podium in a room with wood-paneled walls and vertical blinds. He appears to be speaking or presenting to a small group of people seated in front of him. The audience consists of several individuals seen from behind, including a person in a colorful patterned garment and another in a maroon shirt. To the man's left, there is a black speaker and some electronic audio equipment. A microphone on a stand is positioned near the podium. The text "ORCA" is visible as an overlay on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains at the podium, and the audience stays seated; there is very little movement between the frames, maintaining a static shot of the presentation.
